$comment: Dwarf primitives registry. Maps primitive name -> implementation. Scenarios reference primitives by name only. Adding a primitive is a code change: drop a Python module under primitives/<family>/, register it here, add a params_schema, regenerate docs/primitives-reference.md. Pasted scenarios cannot add primitives. The 'primitives' map is empty in this slice; primitives populate in Slices 7, 12, 13, and 14.

entry_schema.$comment: Documents the shape each entry in 'primitives' must take. Not validated by the runner today; serves as an authoring reference and seed for the loader added in Slice 7.
entry_schema.class: string. Name of the class within that module implementing the primitive interface.
entry_schema.family: string. One of: setup | load | probe | assertion | fault | teardown.
entry_schema.module: string. Python import path of the module providing the primitive.
entry_schema.params_schema: string. Path (relative to dwarf/) to a JSON Schema validating this primitive's parameter object inside a scenario's primitive reference.
entry_schema.runtimes: array of strings. Execution tiers this primitive can run under: library | single-node | devnet.
entry_schema.supports: array of strings. Cardano implementations this primitive can drive: cardano-node | amaru.
entry_schema.version: string. Semver of the primitive itself. Bump on behavior change so that bundles record which version produced the result.
